name: Strawberry Jam Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, cream together the butter and sugar. Beat in the egg yolks. Gradually stir in the flour, then the chopped walnuts until a dough forms. Form the mixture into a ball.
2. Cut the ball of dough in half using a knife or bench scraper. Wrap one half in plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
3. Pat the remaining dough half between two sheets of parchment paper to about 1/8 inch thickness. Remove from plastic wrap, cut into squares, and place on an ungreased 8x8x2 inch pan.
4. Spread strawberry jam over the squares.
5. Place the reserved half of the dough on top of the jam, cutting it into strips and placing them between the squares.
6. Bake at 325°F for 55-60 minutes, or until lightly browned and golden. Allow to cool completely before serving.
